reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the village that became a suburb of Scunthorpe.
2. Using that village, determine who later served as Industrial Chaplain to the Bishop of Lincoln and return the name.
original_final_question: After his curacy at the village that is a suburb of Scunthorpe, who was Industrial Chaplain to the Bishop of Lincoln? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which former Lincolnshire hamlet became a suburb of Scunthorpe? Evidence: Frodingham, Lincolnshire: Frodingham was a hamlet in Lincolnshire which has grown into a suburb of Scunthorpe, North Lincolnshire. -> Frodingham

Node 2: Who was Industrial Chaplain to the Bishop of Lincoln after curacies including Frodingham? Evidence: Bill Dudman: Dudman was educated at King's College, Taunton; the University of Hull and Lincoln Theological College. After curacies at Shiregreen,Wombwell and Frodingham he was Industrial Chaplain to the Bishop of Lincoln from 1957 to 1971. -> Dudman
